name: coderail
description: North-Star Kernel and task/handoff/harness skills for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Keep AI coding aligned, test-gated, and handoff-ready.
interface.longDescription: A workflow kit for AI coding agents. It adds a North-Star Kernel, task contracts, execution batches, harness gates, handoff discipline, asset boundaries, and drift checks without loading a long governance manual every turn.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeRail to align this feature before coding.
Use CodeRail to create a task contract and run the done gate.
